originalSource: Azure Logic Apps runtime reference corpus
notes: Canonical outbound HTTP action with custom timeout, retry policy, async-pattern disabled, and dual response paths (408 on timeout/failure, 200 on success). Upstream top-level 'kind: testState' has been stripped — it is a test-fixture wrapper, not a valid workflow.json property. Substitute 'testURI' and 'testTimeout' with concrete values at emission time.
